title: GE Aerospace turns to robots and ‘Lean’ methods to tackle jet engine repair crunch
snippet: GE is investing $300 million in upgrading their repair hub in Singapore to address the bottleneck in the aviation industry caused by overloaded repair shops and scarce parts.
